title: CuTe Learning - Education with Empathy
content: About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us CuTe App About Us Learn Pricing Blog Contact Us Back to Pricing Pay As You Go One-on-One Doubt Session A flexible 1:1 class you can book anytime, with no monthly commitment. ₹500 Per Class This is a focused one-hour, one-on-one session with a teacher where your child can get help with any specific topic, clear doubts, or prepare for an upcoming test. Ideal for when your child: Needs Quick Revision Perfect for a rapid, comprehensive review right before an exam to boost confidence. Is Feeling Stuck Break down complex, tricky concepts and difficult chapters step by step. Wants Focused Attention Get undivided, personalized guidance for a short, high-impact duration. No Strings Attached You can book a class whenever needed, with no long-term plans or commitments. Your child will also continue to have access to basic CuTe learning tools as usual. Book a Doubt Session 1 Hour • ₹500 Curious Team Learning Private Limited. A Support System to Nurture Every Child.
